title: Iran says Islamabad MoU was inches away
snippet: Iran FM Abbas Araghchi says US and Iran were 'inches away' from Islamabad MoU. Blamed US 'maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade'. Clearest public signal that sides came closer to formal agreement than previously acknowledged.
source_name: Global Village Space, also Express Tribune, The Federal
tag_reason: New Araghchi statement revealing Islamabad MoU was near-complete. Major new detail about talks proximity to agreement.
